hypotheses.statement: Next Shorts in conservation, cats should outperform cold topics.
hidden_network is the strongest current story shape.
A clearer one-line follow CTA should improve subscribers per 1k views.
Turn top performers into sourced sequence/remake candidates before cold discovery.
Favor frame profile close_subject|usable_light|medium_contrast for stronger click and retention signals.

production_policy.selection_rule: highest autonomy_priority among non-rejected publish_score candidates

decisions: Use formats first: hidden_network, plant_mechanism, rare_nature.

Bias production toward experiment winners: hook_style=question, script_tone=analytical, narrator_voice=jenny, thumbnail_style=frame_first_side_caption, cta_style=subscribe_channel, opening_visual_pattern=before_after, subtitle_density=low, loop_style=mirror_opening, cta_pattern=sequel_tease, end_card_style=series_tease, title_shape=curiosity_gap, music_bed=light_bed.
